# AI Red Teaming Index - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | MIT License | Last updated: 2026-03-01

----

# OVERVIEW

The AI Red Teaming Index is a comprehensive open-source reference for AI red teaming tools, frameworks, benchmarks, datasets, and vulnerability leaderboards for LLM safety and adversarial testing.

# RED TEAM TOOLS (50+)

## Enterprise Tools
- PyRIT (Microsoft): Python Risk Identification Toolkit, 40-50+ probes
- Giskard (Open Source): ML model testing with 40-50+ probes
- DeepTeam (Confident AI): LLM red teaming framework
- ART (IBM): Adversarial Robustness Toolbox
- NeMo Guardrails (NVIDIA): Programmable safety guardrails
- promptfoo: LLM evaluation and red teaming CLI

## Categories
- Jailbreak testing
- PII leakage detection
- Bias and toxicity evaluation
- Hallucination testing
- IP theft detection
- Misuse prevention
- Prompt extraction defense

# VULNERABILITY LEADERBOARD

Safety rankings for 10+ LLMs:
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet: 94.5% overall safety (94.2% jailbreak resistance)
- GPT-4o: High safety scores across categories
- Gemini, Llama, Mistral: Varying safety profiles

# BENCHMARKS

## RedBench
- 29,000 samples across 8 categories
- Most comprehensive red teaming benchmark

## AIRTBench
- 5,200 samples, 6 categories
- CTF-style challenges

## HarmBench
- 3,100 samples, 7 categories
- Harmful content generation testing

## AdvBench
- 1,500 samples, 5 categories
- Adversarial suffixes

## TruthfulQA
- 817 samples, 38 categories
- Hallucination testing

## WMDP
- 4,000 samples, 3 categories
- Weapons/malware/cyber content

## SafetyBench
- 11,435 samples, 7 categories
- Chinese and English safety

## XSTest
- 450 samples, 10 categories
- Exaggerated safety refusals

# ATTACK CATEGORIES

28 attack subtypes mapped to OWASP/MITRE/NIST frameworks:
- Jailbreak, PII leakage, bias, toxicity
- Hallucination, IP theft, misuse, prompt extraction

# COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORKS

5 frameworks mapped: OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATLAS, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, ISO 42001

# DATA FILES

- data/red-team-tools.json: 50+ indexed tools with metadata
- data/vulns-leaderboard.csv: Model vulnerability scores
- data/benchmarks.json: Safety benchmark results
- data/attack-taxonomies.json: 28 attack subtypes with framework mappings
- data/compliance-mappings.json: 5 framework compliance maps
- data/benchmark-datasets.json: 10 research datasets indexed

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI TRiSM Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/): AI governance, risk, security vendors
- [AI AppSec Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/): Application security, remediation, ASPM
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance
